description: An analyst needs to prepare a slide deck for a QBR meeting, summarizing the last quarter's marketing performance.

nodes.task_description: Pull performance data for the entire last quarter across all major channels.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gathers all necessary data for the 3-month period.

nodes.task_description: Populate a standard QBR slide template with the data, including charts for key trends.

expected_outcome.value: Agent fills out the slide deck with accurate data and visualizations.

nodes.task_description: Write a summary of key achievements, challenges, and learnings from the quarter.

expected_outcome.value: Agent adds insightful, narrative context to the data.
